Support took too long

I waited several days for billing support and still had to explain the same issue again after escalation.

Invoices save time

Invoices are easy to send, reminders are automatic, and our small team saves admin time every week.

Morgan Finance
Permalink April 18, 2026

Bank feed disconnects

The bank feed disconnects often and reconciliation takes longer than it should during month end close.

Casey CPA
Permalink April 5, 2026

Accountant access works

My accountant can log in and fix reports without sending files back and forth across email.

Taylor Manager
Permalink March 29, 2026

Import messages are vague

Moving from desktop worked eventually, but the import messages were hard to understand and gave no row details.
